description_long: This is a classic wood-handled axe featuring a robust, slightly curved handle made from a reddish-brown hardwood. The handle is ergonomically shaped, tapering at the end for a secure grip and slightly widening near the head for added strength. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite side for striking. The blade edge is straight and sharp, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with no visible fasteners or modern composite elements. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative markings or branding.
description: A traditional wood-handled axe with a curved, reddish-brown handle and a dark metal wedge-shaped blade, designed for chopping and striking tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, dark metal axe head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded end of the handle and the narrow profile of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the blade's edge, the mounting of the head onto the handle, and the handle's cross-section.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle, reddish-brown, ergonomic with a rounded end and oval cross-section, designed for a secure grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge and a flat poll, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, head fitted onto the handle with no visible fasteners.
